mainText:
Promo: "Bank of Entitlement: Where Your Every Whim is Our Command! Because you deserve it all."

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: ---So, picture this-I stroll into the Bank of Entitlement, ready to make a simple withdrawal. As I walk up to the teller, I notice they only have one pen available for customers to use. One pen, can you believe it? I mean, how dare they not anticipate my need for a choice of pen color to match my outfit?! Well, I didn't stand for it. I demanded to speak to the manager, and when they finally arrived, I unleashed a tirade of entitlement so epic, even I surprised myself. I informed them that my withdrawal experience was utterly ruined by their lack of pen variety and demanded immediate compensation. After a brief but intense negotiation (which, of course, took place in the fanciest conference room they had), they agreed to issue a formal apology letter, a year's worth of free pens in various colors, and a designated "pen curator" to ensure this atrocity would never happen again.Victorious, I left the bank with a smug grin, knowing that my unwavering dedication to entitlement had once again prevailed. And to think, all this just because of a pen. But hey, in the world of Hot Josh, every little inconvenience is an opportunity to assert my rightful place at the top of the entitlement pyramid.
